title: いつか一流のプリンセスに

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gyaah! Ohhh, I did it again...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: My precious pen... Oh, I'm such an airhead!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: P-please calm down, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You'll injure yourself if you keep squeezing it like
that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm doing some research in the library, I
hear a commotion at another desk. It appears the
source of the ruckus is none other than Kawakami
Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, Trainer, would you listen to what I've
done?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I completely broke my pen! Even though I was being gentle with it, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And it was the matching pen I received from King,
too!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you dingus! Didn't I just teach you this a
moment ago?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Just one more time, please!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, why do you have such trouble
remembering these things?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing for it, then. I'll give you this pen,
so write out what I've taught you over and over
until it's thoroughly ingrained into that brain of
yours!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure it's okay for me to have this?! Isn't
this pen only meant for people who are
first-rate?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Guiding those who work hard is in itself
first-rate! Consider this a sign of my generosity!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Make good use of that pen and set your sights on
becoming a first-rate Umamusume like me!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It was so cute how happy you were receiving that
pen from King.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course I was! King's my idol! She's great
at both academics and sports, and she's always
giving it her all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
With her crown pen, I thought I'd surely be able
to work hard and catch up to her level.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But now I've gone and broken it! I'm such an idiot!
I want to give myself a huge smack on the head!
choice_data_list:
The hard work you've put in won't just
disappear.

The hard work you've put in won't just
disappear.
If anything, I'm sure King Halo will be pleased.
If anything, I'm sure King Halo will be pleased.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But now I've gone and broken it! I'm such an idiot!
I want to give myself a huge smack on the head!
choice_data_list:
The hard work you've put in won't just
disappear.

The hard work you've put in won't just
disappear.
If anything, I'm sure King Halo will be pleased.
If anything, I'm sure King Halo will be pleased.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No! My efforts barely amount to anything!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That isn't true! Since then, you scored three
points higher on your test!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But I'm telling you it was all thanks to King's pen!
choice_data_list: What's special isn't the pen—it's you!
What's special isn't the pen—it's you!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Your grades improved because you
studied like crazy!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's really incredible how you've been studying
every day without getting disheartened!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, everyone... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy! Your words have moved me to
tears!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep doing my best! I won't let all
those days of hard work using that pen go to
waste!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That's great! So, should we continue studying?

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Once we're finished, we can visit some stores to
see if they sell the same kind of pen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you so much! We all would do better to
have kind friends like youuu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess resumes her studies with a new
pen in hand. It seems she's been blessed with
some great friends.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You think King will be pleased, even though
I broke her pen?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Who is it? Who out there is calling my first-rate
name?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gyah! It's K-King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Kawakami. So? How exactly are you
planning to please my first-rate self?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
W-w-wait! That's not what I was saying! Th-the
truth is...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. So you've been studying so much that the
pen wound up breaking.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry! I completely ruined the treasure
you gave me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, what's there to feel sorry for? This merely
proves how aggressively you've been studying.
Show more pride in your efforts!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm impressed by how hard you've been working
to get to my level!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hehe, she really is pleased, after all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sob... I'm so h-happy! Oh, King, you're so warmhearted!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Naturally! Now then, let me see just how far
you've come in your studies! Be grateful for my
first-rate guidance!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wait... what's this? Are you kidding?! You're still making the same mistakes as before! I'll give you another pen, so try to study a little harder!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Waaah! I-I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now with the addition of King Halo, the four
continue their studies. It's rather heartwarming to
see the way they all get along.
